notes: Node 2.29 makes the temp-folder pre-flight bulletproof. Proven cause of the 3060's intermittent freeze: on its flaky disk, os.makedirs() (temp folder) and shutil.disk_usage() (free-space check) could block forever before Step 1, wedging a worker at 'Starting...'. Both are now timeout-guarded (makedirs 15s, disk_usage 6s), and the whole pipeline dispatch is wrapped so a timeout errors the job cleanly and frees the thread instead of black-holing — the job requeues and retries (on this node or the other) instead of sitting stuck forever. The 3060 already processes fine once past this step (its GPU reads 0% only because nvidia-smi utilization.gpu doesn't reflect the NVENC engine; jobs advance at the same rate as the 5080). Update BOTH nodes to 2.29.
